LAW AND MOTION, 302, RE: PLAINTIFF'S/CROSS DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S/CROSS DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THERE IS NO MEET AND CONFER DECLARATION IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. MOREOVER, THE DEMURRER WAS NOT FILED AND SERVED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1005 AND THERE IS NO POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ON FILE WITH THE COURT. MOVANT ONLY FILED THE "DEMURRER" AND NOTICE OF HEARING ON JUNE 21, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Continued To Nov-22-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Frank Zeccola, Esq.(408) 993-8493 Costanzo Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Tiana Harding, Esq. 415.288.6387 for Defendant and Cross-Complainant Fictiv Inc.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANTS VINCENT JUARES, ROWENA STOEFFLER'S Amended MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT.

The motion to strike is denied. The court liberally construes the pleading per CCP 452 and Fictiv alleges facts regarding fraudulent and malicious conduct.

Order is signed after the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Amended DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Frank Zeccola, Esq.(408) 993-8493 Costanzo Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Tiana Harding, Esq. 415.288.6387 for Defendant and Cross-Complainant Fictiv Inc.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANTS VINCENT JUARES, ROWENA STOEFFLER'S Amended DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

Cross-defendants Juares and Stoeffler's demurrer to the first cause of action for breach of duty of loyalty is overruled. Fictiv alleges that cross-defendants were its agents/employees and those allegations support the claim. In addition, the pleading expressly alleges that they acted as Fictiv's fiduciary, which raises a factual issue. (See Huong Que, Inc. v. Luu (2007) 150 Cal.App.4th 400, 410-411, 414 ["Thus an employee, while employed, owes undivided loyalty to his employer."]; Cross-Complaint, pars. 12-13, 30 ["Cross-Defendants were entrusted with certain duties and responsibilities and owed a fiduciary duty to Fictiv not to harm the business."].)

The demurrer to the second cause of action for computer fraud is overruled. The elements for a cause of action for violations of Penal Code Section 502(c)(1) and (2) require that a person who "without permission (1) alters, damages, deletes, destroys or otherwise uses any data, computer, computer system or computer network in order to either devise or execute any scheme to defraud, deceive or wrongfully control or obtain money, property or data, or (2) take, copies or makes use of any data from a computer, computer system or computer network, or takes or copies any supporting documentation, whether existing or residing internal or external to a computer, computer system or computer network." Fictiv's allegations are pleaded with sufficient particularity. (Cross-complaint, pars. 20-26.) Paragraph 41 pleads damages from cross-defendants' conduct.

The demurrer to the fifth cause of action for violation of the unfair competition law is overruled. That claim, which incorporates the computer fraud allegations, pleads a cause of action. Harm is specifically alleged at 13:21-25 of the cross complaint.

Order is signed after the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiffs/Cross Defendants VINCENT JUARES and ROWENA STOEFFLER's DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's/Cross Defendants DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is off calendar. There is no meet and confer declaration in compliance with CCP 430.41. Moreover, the demurrer was not filed and served in compliance with CCP 1005 and there is no points and authorities on file with the court. Movant only filed the "demurrer" and notice of hearing on June 21, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
